FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class RadioButton

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI RadioButton — style values from microsoft-ui-xaml controls\dev\CommonStyles\RadioButton_themeresources.xaml ("the template"; ThemeDictionaries Default=dark :4-61 / Light :120-177): a 20px ring (OuterEllipse/CheckOuterEllipse, :371/373) + (when selected) a TextOnAccent dot (CheckGlyph, :374) that grows 12→14 on hover / shrinks →10 on press over ControlNormalAnimationDuration (250ms) with the ControlFastOutSlowInKeySpline (:255-260/:292-297), plus the unchecked-pressed 4px proto-dot (PressedCheckGlyph, :376) revealing toward 10 over ControlFastAnimationDuration (167ms, :298-306). Mutual exclusion comes from a shared selected index — use Group(IReadOnlyList<string>, int, Action<int>, bool, Style?, bool, TemplateParts?) (an ad-hoc set) or the full RadioButtons container (header, columns, roving keyboard). Controlled.

public static class RadioButton

object
RadioButton

object.ToString()

Fields

PartDot

The selected accent dot (WinUI CheckGlyph). Owned: Key (reconcile identity), Animate (the disabled-entry 12→14 resize spec).

public const string PartDot = "Dot"

Field Value

string

PartLabel

The default text label (a TextEl — use Parts.Set<TextEl>(RadioButton.PartLabel, …)); not applied when a content element fills the slot (slots restructure, parts style). Owned: none.

public const string PartLabel = "Label"

Field Value

string

PartPressedDot

The unchecked-pressed 4px proto-dot (WinUI PressedCheckGlyph). Owned: Key (reconcile identity).

public const string PartPressedDot = "PressedDot"

Field Value

string

PartRing

The 20px outer ellipse (WinUI OuterEllipse/CheckOuterEllipse). Owned: Children (the conditional dot mount — CheckGlyph when selected, PressedCheckGlyph when not).

public const string PartRing = "Ring"

Field Value

string

PartRoot

The returned clickable row (WinUI RootGrid). Owned: OnClick (the select), OnKeyDown (the container's arrow roving), OnRealized (handle capture, chained), Role, TabStop (the roving single-tab-stop contract), Children.

public const string PartRoot = "Root"

Field Value

string

Methods

Create(string, bool, Action, Style?, bool, TemplateParts?) 

public static BoxEl Create(string label, bool selected, Action onSelect, RadioButton.Style? style = null, bool isEnabled = true, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

label string
selected bool
onSelect Action
style RadioButton.Style
isEnabled bool
parts TemplateParts

Returns

BoxEl

Group(IReadOnlyList<string>, int, Action<int>, bool, Style?, bool, TemplateParts?)

A mutually-exclusive group: renders one radio per option; clicking option i invokes onSelect(i). Ad-hoc (every item is a tab stop, no arrow roving) — prefer RadioButtons for the WinUI container semantics.

public static BoxEl Group(IReadOnlyList<string> options, int selected, Action<int> onSelect, bool horizontal = false, RadioButton.Style? style = null, bool isEnabled = true, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

options IReadOnlyList<string>
selected int
onSelect Action<int>
horizontal bool
style RadioButton.Style
isEnabled bool
parts TemplateParts

Returns

BoxEl
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
